seoTitle: Wantagong vs Wapengo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wantagong and Wapengo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wantagong and Wapengo.
heading: Wantagong vs Wapengo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wantagong, New South Wales and Wapengo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wapengo has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Wantagong (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wantagong or Wapengo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wantagong has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Wapengo scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wantagong scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Wapengo scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wantagong or Wapengo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wapengo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
